song.title: The Love of Jesus
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) There is no love like the love of Jesus, Never to fade or fall, Till into the rest of the house of God He has gathered us all.
[C] Chorus Jesus’ love, precious love, Boundless, and pure, and free; Oh, turn to that love, weary wand’ring soul; Jesus pleadeth for thee.
[V2] 2) There is no heart like the heart of Jesus, Filled with a tender love; No throb nor throe that our hearts can know, But He feels it above.
[V3] 3) There is no eye like the eye of Jesus, Piercing so far away; Ne’er out of the sight of its tender light Can the wanderer stray.
[V4] 4) There is no voice like the voice of Jesus, Tender and sweet its chime; Like musical ring of a flowing spring In the bright summertime.
[V5] 5) Oh, let us hark to the voice of Jesus! Oh, may we never roam; Till safe we rest on His loving breast, In the dear heavenly home.
song.author: William E. Littlewood
